title: tephrosia rechingeri
intro: Tephrosia rechingeri, also known as the 'Khatroot', is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, the plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia rechingeri include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and powder, often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
